result.stdout:
Usage: gpr [command] [options]

Options:
  --help        Show help information
  -k|--api-key  The access token to use

Commands:
  delete        Delete package versions
  details       View package details
  encode        Encode PAT to prevent it from being automatically deleted by
                GitHub
  files         List files for a package
  list          List packages for user or org (viewer if not specified)
  push          Publish a package
  setApiKey     Set GitHub API key/personal access token

Run 'gpr [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: gpr [command] [options]

Options:
  --help        Show help information
  -k|--api-key  The access token to use

Commands:
  delete        Delete package versions
  details       View package details
  encode        Encode PAT to prevent it from being automatically deleted by
                GitHub
  files         List files for a package
  list          List packages for user or org (viewer if not specified)
  push          Publish a package
  setApiKey     Set GitHub API key/personal access token

Run 'gpr [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Delete package versions

Usage: gpr delete [options] <PackagesPath>

Arguments:
  PackagesPath       Path to packages in the form `owner`, `owner/repo` or
                     `owner/repo/package`

Options:
  --help             Show help information
  --docker-clean-up  Clean up orphaned docker layers
  --force            Delete all package versions
  -v|--version       The version to delete
  -k|--api-key       The access token to use

result.stdout:
Publish a package

Usage: gpr push [options] <GlobPatterns>

Arguments:
  GlobPatterns               Path to the package file

Options:
  --help                     Show help information
  -r|--repository            Override current nupkg repository url. Format:
                             owner/repository. E.g: jcansdale/gpr
  -v|--version               Override current nupkg version
  -c|--concurrency           The number of packages to upload simultaneously.
                             Default value is 4.
  --retries                  The number of retries in case of intermittent
                             connection issue. Default value is 3. Set to 0 if
                             you want to disable automatic retry.
  --subdomain-isolation-off  Subdomain isolation is off for GitHub Enterprise
                             Server appliance.
  -k|--api-key               The access token to use

commands.payload:
Publish a package

Usage: gpr push [options] <GlobPatterns>

Arguments:
  GlobPatterns               Path to the package file

Options:
  --help                     Show help information
  -r|--repository            Override current nupkg repository url. Format:
                             owner/repository. E.g: jcansdale/gpr
  -v|--version               Override current nupkg version
  -c|--concurrency           The number of packages to upload simultaneously.
                             Default value is 4.
  --retries                  The number of retries in case of intermittent
                             connection issue. Default value is 3. Set to 0 if
                             you want to disable automatic retry.
  --subdomain-isolation-off  Subdomain isolation is off for GitHub Enterprise
                             Server appliance.
  -k|--api-key               The access token to use

result.stdout:
Set GitHub API key/personal access token

Usage: gpr setApiKey [options] <ApiKey> <PackageSource>

Arguments:
  ApiKey         Token / API key
  PackageSource  The name of the package source (defaults to 'github')

Options:
  --help         Show help information
  --config-file  The NuGet configuration file. If not specified, file the
                 SpecialFolder.ApplicationData + NuGet/NuGet.Config is used
  -k|--api-key   The access token to use

commands.payload:
Set GitHub API key/personal access token

Usage: gpr setApiKey [options] <ApiKey> <PackageSource>

Arguments:
  ApiKey         Token / API key
  PackageSource  The name of the package source (defaults to 'github')

Options:
  --help         Show help information
  --config-file  The NuGet configuration file. If not specified, file the
                 SpecialFolder.ApplicationData + NuGet/NuGet.Config is used
  -k|--api-key   The access token to use
